_note: test_scanner.py top-level initialize_pickle_files() pickles a payload whose __reduce__ does `import torch.utils.bottleneck.__main__`. Without torch installed, collection errors and the test never runs. Install CPU-only torch so the import resolves; the test never actually invokes torch.load. Pin to torch 2.1.0 because torch>=2.5 removed the torch.utils.bottleneck submodule, and torch 2.1 lacks ShapeEnv.evaluate_guards_expression; 2.4 has both.

install_cmds: python -m pip install -U pip wheel pytest aiohttp py7zr requests numpy==1.23.4
